SEARCH
Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder

Enclosing interface:
BroadcastsAuth
public static interface BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    autoLeaderboard()
    Compute and display a simple leaderboard based on game results
    BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    autoLeaderboard(boolean autoLeaderboard)
    Compute and display a simple leaderboard based on game results
    BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    longDescription(String markup)
     
    BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    name(String name)
     
    BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    players(String players)
    Replace player names, ratings and titles.
    When broadcast rounds are created with a Sync URL, it is possible to apply player information replacement when the PGN is fetched.
    The replacements are specified in the broadcast with one line per player.
    It is possible to replace using either the FIDE ID of a player or by manually providing overriding values.
    FIDE ID format
    <player name> = <FIDE ID>
    Manual format
    <player name> / <rating> / <title> / <new name>

    The <rating>, <title> and <new name> are optional and can be left blank.
    Player names ignore case and punctuation, and match all possible combinations of 2 words:
    "Jorge Rick Vito" will match "Jorge Rick", "jorge vito", "Rick, Vito", etc.
    Example: 
      var broadcast = client.broadcasts().create(params -> params
     .name("Broadcast Name")
     .shortDescription("Short Broadcast Description")
     .longDescription("""
         A longer description,
         with *markdown* support.
         """)
     .players("""
         Elli = 4641833
         Player One / 2700 / WGM / Numero Uno
         Player Two / / / Deuce
         Player Three / 1300 / /
         """));
    BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    shortDescription(String description)
     
    BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    teams(String teams)
    Assign players to teams.
    By default the PGN tags WhiteTeam and BlackTeam are used.
    One line per player, formatted as such:
    <Team name>;<FIDE ID or Player name>
      var broadcast = client.broadcasts().create(params -> params
     .name("Broadcast Name")
     .shortDescription("Short Broadcast Description")
     .longDescription("""
         A longer description,
         with *markdown* support.
         """)
     .teamTable()
     .teams("""
         Team Cats;3408230
         Team Dogs;Scooby Doo
         """));
    default BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    teamTable()
    Show a team leaderboard.
    BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    teamTable(boolean teamTable)
    Show a team leaderboard.
    BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder
    tier(int tier)
    Only for admins.

  • Method Details

    • name

      BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder name(String name)
      Parameters:
      name - Name of the broadcast tournament.
      Length must be between 3 and 80 characters.
      Example: Sinquefield Cup

    • shortDescription

      BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder shortDescription(String description)
      Parameters:
      description - Short description of the broadcast tournament.
      Length must be between 3 and 400 characters.
      Example: An 11 round classical tournament featuring the 9 highest rated players in the world. Including Carlsen, Caruana, Ding, Aronian, Nakamura and more.

    • longDescription

      BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder longDescription(String markup)
      Parameters:
      markup - Optional long description of the broadcast. Markdown is supported.
      Length must be less than 20,000 characters.

    • tier

      BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder tier(int tier)
      Only for admins.
      Parameters:
      tier - Broadcast tier. [3 4 5]. 3 normal, 4 high, 5 best.

    • autoLeaderboard

      BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder autoLeaderboard(boolean autoLeaderboard)
      Compute and display a simple leaderboard based on game results

    • autoLeaderboard

      default BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder autoLeaderboard()
      Compute and display a simple leaderboard based on game results

    • teamTable

      BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder teamTable(boolean teamTable)
      Show a team leaderboard.

    • teamTable

      default BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder teamTable()
      Show a team leaderboard.

    • players

      BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder players(String players)
      Replace player names, ratings and titles.
      When broadcast rounds are created with a Sync URL, it is possible to apply player information replacement when the PGN is fetched.
      The replacements are specified in the broadcast with one line per player.
      It is possible to replace using either the FIDE ID of a player or by manually providing overriding values.
      FIDE ID format
      <player name> = <FIDE ID>
      Manual format
      <player name> / <rating> / <title> / <new name>

      The <rating>, <title> and <new name> are optional and can be left blank.
      Player names ignore case and punctuation, and match all possible combinations of 2 words:
      "Jorge Rick Vito" will match "Jorge Rick", "jorge vito", "Rick, Vito", etc.
      Example: 
        var broadcast = client.broadcasts().create(params -> params
     .name("Broadcast Name")
     .shortDescription("Short Broadcast Description")
     .longDescription("""
         A longer description,
         with *markdown* support.
         """)
     .players("""
         Elli = 4641833
         Player One / 2700 / WGM / Numero Uno
         Player Two / / / Deuce
         Player Three / 1300 / /
         """));

    • teams

      BroadcastsAuth.BroadcastBuilder teams(String teams)
      Assign players to teams.
      By default the PGN tags WhiteTeam and BlackTeam are used.
      One line per player, formatted as such:
      <Team name>;<FIDE ID or Player name>
        var broadcast = client.broadcasts().create(params -> params
     .name("Broadcast Name")
     .shortDescription("Short Broadcast Description")
     .longDescription("""
         A longer description,
         with *markdown* support.
         """)
     .teamTable()
     .teams("""
         Team Cats;3408230
         Team Dogs;Scooby Doo
         """));
